summary: Completed testing of Priority 1 fixes for Oryno Platform. Successfully verified login page improvements, admin functionality, and key components. Authentication session persistence issues prevent full testing of all authenticated pages.

minor_bugs.issue: Authentication session not persisting properly across page navigation
minor_bugs.impact: Users may need to re-login frequently, affects testing of authenticated pages

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile logo missing object-contain class - may appear stretched

integration_issues.issue: Session persistence issues causing redirects to login page

passed_tests: Login page logo has object-contain class (desktop version)
Color scheme #082c59 implemented correctly across components
Admin login with admin@test.com credentials works
Commission Management page loads with proper functionality
Loyalty page renders with tier info, points, and rewards system
FCFA currency format implemented in utility function
FCFA currency visible on Loyalty page
Calendar and Popover components have white backgrounds (bg-white classes)
Browse Services page code implementation looks correct
Receipts page code implementation looks correct
New pages created: BrowseServices.jsx, Receipts.jsx, Loyalty.jsx, CommissionManagement.jsx
Sidebar menu includes Loyalty and Management items in Layout.jsx
Currency utility formatCurrency() function working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication session persistence issue to allow proper testing of all authenticated pages. Add object-contain class to mobile logo. All Priority 1 fixes appear to be implemented correctly in code but need session fix for full verification.
